name: Saber
desc: The solitary Heroic Spirit traverses the long night of fate. The banner of the round table remains unfurled in a dream. Alas, the knight-king of Camelot has yet to reach that ever-distant utopia.\nThough still a young maiden, she has heeded the call for this most unique iteration of the Holy Grail War. With the Sword in the Stone offering its choice once more, how shall she shatter the illusions of the past?\n— "The wishes I did not fulfill will end here."

1.name: The Lost White Walls
1.desc: Increases the Ultimate DMG dealt by <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> uses Basic ATK or Skill, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Core Resonance."

2.name: The Lost Oath of the Round Table
2.desc: For every 1 point of "Core Resonance" gained in this battle, <unbreak>Saber</unbreak>'s DMG dealt ignores <unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak> of the target's DEF. This effect stacks up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s). When triggering the "Core Resonance" effect to boost Skill's multiplier, each point of "Core Resonance" additionally increases the DMG multiplier for the current instance of Skill by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: A Wish Across Fifteen Centuries
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: The Saga of Sixteen Winter Days
4.desc: Increases <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> Wind <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After using Ultimate, increases <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> Wind <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. This effect stacks up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s).

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

5.name: The Dreamed Utopian Dawn
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: The Long Fated Night
6.desc: The Wind <u>RES PEN</u> of the Ultimate DMG dealt by <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. The amount of overflow Energy that can be accumulated with the Trace "Blessing of the Lake" increases to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>. After using Ultimate for the first time upon entering combat, regenerates a fixed amount of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Energy for <unbreak>Saber</unbreak>. This effect can trigger 1 time after every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Ultimate use(s).

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

101401.name: Invisible Air: Barrier of the Wind King
101401.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> ATK to one designated enemy.
101401.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one designated enemy.

101402.name: Strike Air: Hammer of the Wind King
101402.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> ATK to adjacent targets. If <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> currently holds "Core Resonance" and her Energy can be fully regenerated by consuming "Core Resonance" after this instance of Skill attack, then increases the multiplier for this instance of Skill. For every 1 point of "Core Resonance," increases the DMG multiplier for this instance of Skill by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>. And after the attack, consumes all "Core Resonance" to regenerate Energy for <unbreak>Saber</unbreak>. Otherwise, immediately gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Core Resonance."
101402.simple_desc: Deals Wind DMG to one designated enemy and minor Wind DMG to adjacent targets. If Energy can be fully regenerated by consuming "Core Resonance" after attacking, then <color=#f29e38ff>increases the DMG multiplier for this instance of Skill based on "Core Resonance" points and consumes all "Core Resonance" after the attack</color>. Otherwise, <color=#f29e38ff>gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> "Core Resonance" point(s).</color>

101403.name: Excalibur
101403.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance being Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> ATK dealt to one random enemy. After using Ultimate, the next Basic ATK switches to "Release, the Golden Scepter," and only "Release, the Golden Scepter" can be used.
101403.simple_desc: Deals massive Wind DMG to all enemies. Additionally deals minor Wind DMG to random enemies, bouncing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). And enhances the next Basic ATK.

101404.name: Dragon Reactor Core
101404.desc: When entering combat, gains <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> "Core Resonance" point(s). When any ally target uses Ultimate, increases the DMG dealt by <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Core Resonance" point(s). For every 1 "Core Resonance" point consumed, regenerates a fixed amount of <unbreak>#5[f1]</unbreak> Energy for <unbreak>Saber</unbreak>.
101404.simple_desc: When entering combat, <color=#f29e38ff>gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak></color> "Core Resonance" point(s)</color>. When any ally target uses Ultimate, increases the DMG dealt by <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> and <color=#f29e38ff>gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> "Core Resonance" point(s)</color>. Consuming "Core Resonance" will <color=#f29e38ff>regenerate Energy</color> for <unbreak>Saber</unbreak>.

101406.name: Attack
101406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

101407.name: Behold, the King of Knights
101407.desc: After using Technique, at the start of the next battle, increases <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Core Resonance."
101407.simple_desc: After using Technique, at the start of the next battle, <color=#f29e38ff>gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> "Core Resonance" point(s)</color> and increases ATK.

101408.name: Release, the Golden Scepter
101408.desc: Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Core Resonance" and deals Wind DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> ATK. When this ability is used, if the number of enemy targets is 2 or 1, additionally deals Wind DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> or <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> ATK respectively.
101408.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> "Core Resonance"</color> and deals Wind DMG to all enemies. If there are 2 or fewer enemy targets on the field when this ability is used, additionally deals Wind DMG to all enemies.

1.point_desc: Increases <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When entering combat or when using her Enhanced Basic ATK, gains the "Mana Burst" effect. Under this effect, if <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> has "Core Resonance" and her Energy can be fully regenerated by using her Skill and consuming "Core Resonance," then consumes "Mana Burst" to recover 1 Skill Point for allies, and causes <unbreak>Saber</unbreak> to immediately take action.

<unbreak>Saber</unbreak> can accumulate up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> overflow Energy. After using Ultimate, the overflow Energy is cleared and a corresponding amount of Energy is regenerated. When the battle starts, if Energy is below <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, it is regenerated to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

When using Skill, increases <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns. During this battle, for every 1 point of "Core Resonance" gained, increases <unbreak>Saber's</unbreak> CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, stacking up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s).
